description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white or light gray, with a large paved driveway and walkway extending from the main entrance and garage. The building features a rooftop garden area with greenery and a small tree, adding a touch of nature to the otherwise stark architecture. Windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern, and the garage is integrated into the main structure. The main entrance is recessed, providing a sheltered entryway, and the overall structure is compact and functional. The landscaping is minimal, with a focus on clean lines and open paved spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a rooftop garden, integrated garage, and large paved driveway. The design is minimalist with clean lines and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, and a large paved driveway leading up to the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, rooftop garden, and the extended paved walkway along the side of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the recessed entryway, visible rooftop greenery, and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side windows, garage, and the continuation of the paved driveway.
